description: You are a patient safety officer at Memorial Hospital conducting an alarm fatigue investigation following nursing staff complaints about excessive false alarms from the OpenICE monitoring system. Audit the OpenICE alarm configuration by evaluating simulated device data and clinical application features for alarm states and adjustable parameters. Assess the appropriateness of current alarm thresholds for an ICU population. Write a clinical alarm audit report to /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_audit.txt. The report must include: (1) the specific vital sign parameters examined and identified threshold values, (2) an assessment of whether current simulated vital sign values fall within or outside normal ICU ranges, (3) an identification of which alarms are active versus suppressed, and (4) specific evidence-based recommendations for numeric threshold adjustments to reduce alarm fatigue while maintaining patient safety. OpenICE Supervisor is already running on the desktop.
